data.body: EPIC 6d0d CLOSED — completion-verifier passed. ALL 11 descendants closed (368c/42d1/e4df/5893/4214/8d8e/ee0b/8f1d/76d2/6a89/accc). All code landed on main. Trusted op-cert gate service LIVE + signing PASS op-certs in production (API GW p38uolodo3, box compose-opcert-1). Op-cert epic delivered: asymmetric env-attributed op-certs on DSSE/SSHSIG, out-of-band trust config, merge-gate verify-opcert, producer signing seam, trusted remote gate service + client, AWS deploy, HMAC removal, ADR 0049. 3 deploy blockers found+fixed by the real deploy (bug accc). DONE.
